content: coderev v1.3.0 Issue 关联校验
Sentinel AgentOS 全功能启用：Guard + Memory + Evaluator
Select-String -Path "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\README.md" -Pattern "接入|Integration|OpenClaw|openclaw" -SimpleMatch | Select-Object LineNumber, Line

Remove-Item C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\_patch_plugin.js -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Remove-Item C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\_bench_result.txt -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Remove-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\register_was_called.txt" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Write-Output "Cleaned up test artifacts"
npx sentinel-agentos rule delete "高风险操作前必须 preCheck" 2>&1

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='C:/Users/十号/agentos/memory/semantic.json'; if(fs.existsSync(p)){const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf-8'));console.log('found, rules:',d.rules?.length||0);const before=d.rules.length;d.rules=d.rules.filter(r=>!r.pattern.includes('preCheck')&&!r.pattern.includes('postCheck'));console.log('removed '+ (before-d.rules.length)+' rules');fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(d,null,2));console.log('done')}else{console.log('NOT found at '+p)}"
Get-ChildItem C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\.agentos -File | Select-Object Name, Length

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='C:/Users/十号/.openclaw/workspace/.agentos/semantic.json'; const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf-8')); const before=d.rules.length; d.rules=d.rules.filter(r=>!r.pattern.includes('preCheck')&&!r.pattern.includes('postCheck')); fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(d,null,2)); console.log('Removed '+(before-d.rules.length)+' rules, remaining: '+d.rules.length)"

# 检查 plugin 实时状态
openclaw plugins list 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "sentinel|hook" | Select-Object -First 5

# 找到 plugin index.ts 中写审计日志的代码位置
Select-String -Path "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\plugins\sentinel-agentos\src\index.ts" -Pattern "tool|auditWrite|lightLine" -SimpleMatch | Select-Object LineNumber, Line
cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\src; Select-String -Path "audit-log.ts" -Pattern "stats|byTool|toolName" | Select-Object LineNumber, Line

node -e "const aos=require('sentinel-agentos'); const keys=Object.keys(aos).filter(k=>k.includes('eva')||k.includes('Eva')||k.includes('evaluator')); console.log(keys); console.log('has evaluator:', (typeof aos.Evaluator === 'function'));"

node -e "const aos=require('sentinel-agentos'); const m=new aos.PostExecEvaluator({outcomeScore:1,resourceEfficiency:1,acceptanceRate:1,verifyPassRate:1}); console.log('can instantiate:', typeof m); console.log('PostExecEvaluator keys:', Object.keys(aos.PostExecEvaluator.prototype));"

$src = Get-FileHash "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\plugins\sentinel-agentos\dist\index.mjs" -Algorithm SHA256
$dst = Get-FileHash "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\extensions\sentinel-agentos\dist\index.mjs" -Algorithm SHA256
Write-Output "Source: $($src.Hash)"
Write-Output "Install: $($dst.Hash)"
Write-Output "Match: $($src.Hash -eq $dst.Hash)"

# 看 stats 方法的 byTool 行
Select-String -Path "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\dist\guard\audit-log.js" -Pattern "tName|byTool" | Select-Object LineNumber, Line

cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos; Copy-Item dist\guard\audit-log.js C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\node_modules\sentinel-agentos\dist\guard\audit-log.js -Force; Write-Output "Synced audit-log.js to npm package"

# 清理旧 audit 数据，只留最近 5 条
$lines = Get-Content "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\.agentos\audit.jsonl"
$lines[-5..-1] | Set-Content "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\.agentos\audit.jsonl"
Write-Output "Trimmed audit.jsonl to last 5 entries"
Select-String -Path "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\plugins\sentinel-agentos\src\index.ts" toolName | Select-Object LineNumber, Line
cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos; npx jest tests/memory/episodic.test.ts --no-coverage -t "should return all events sorted newest first" 2>&1

cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos; git add CHANGELOG.md README.md src/evaluator/profiler.ts src/guard/audit-log.ts src/memory/episodic.ts tests/memory/episodic.test.ts; git commit -m "v0.3.11: P0/P1 修复 — stats byTool undefined, profile 假阳性 warning, episodic 压缩死循环, generateContextSummary 截断"
cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\plugins\sentinel-agentos; git add README.md package.json; git commit -m "docs: add README + include in npm files"

# 从 OpenClaw docs 里找 ClawdHub 贡献指南
Get-ChildItem "C:\Users\十号\AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\docs" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "clawhub|publish|submit|contribute" } | Select-Object FullName

$content = Get-Content "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\MEMORY.md" -Raw
$old = @'
### 未完成待办
- [ ] **🔴 明天 npm 发布**：`sentinel-agentos@0.3.11` + `sentinel-agentos-plugin@1.0.1`（plugin 被 npm 24h 锁定，明天解禁重发）
- [ ] **🔴 明天 ClawdHub 收录**：去 clawdhub/openclaw-plugins 提 PR 收录 sentinel-agentos-plugin
- [x] ~~Sentinel AgentOS Guard + Plugin 接入 OpenClaw（2026-06-14）~~
- [x] ~~AgentOS P0/P1 修复：stats + profiler + episodic（2026-06-14）~~
- [ ] AgentOS P0-2：profiler totalOps 为 0
- [ ] AgentOS P2-8：自动清理 cron
- [ ] AgentOS P2-9：CLI rule 命令
- [ ] GitHub Sponsors 正式开通
- [x] ~~Product Hunt 审核通过~~
- [ ] Sentinel AgentOS Phase 1.5 Evaluator 层
- [ ] 远期：SaaS 规则仓库
- [x] ~~Profiler NaN 修复~~
'@
$new = @'
### 未完成待办
- [ ] **🔴 明天（6/15）npm 发布**：`sentinel-agentos@0.3.11` + `sentinel-agentos-plugin@1.0.1`（plugin 被 npm 24h 锁定，明天解禁重发）
- [ ] **🔴 明天 ClawdHub 收录**：去 clawdhub/openclaw-plugins 提 PR 收录 sentinel-agentos-plugin
- [ ] **🟡 Product Hunt Launch**：[清单](ph-launch-checklist.md) → Logo → GIF → 截图 → 产品页 → 选周三 Launch
- [x] ~~Sentinel AgentOS Guard + Plugin 接入 OpenClaw（2026-06-14）~~
- [x] ~~AgentOS P0/P1 修复：stats + profiler + episodic（2026-06-14）~~
- [ ] AgentOS P0-2：profiler totalOps 为 0
- [ ] AgentOS P2-8：自动清理 cron
- [ ] AgentOS P2-9：CLI rule 命令
- [ ] GitHub Sponsors 正式开通（设置 tiers）
- [x] ~~Product Hunt 审核通过~~
- [ ] Sentinel AgentOS Phase 1.5 Evaluator 层
- [ ] 远期：SaaS 规则仓库
- [x] ~~Profiler NaN 修复~~
'@
$content = $content.Replace($old, $new)
Set-Content "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\MEMORY.md" $content -NoNewline
Write-Output "Updated"
cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace; git checkout -- MEMORY.md

mkdir -p "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\assets" 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\assets" -Name 2>$null; echo "---exists---"; Test-Path "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\coderev\logo.svg"; Test-Path "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\coderev\logo.png"
cd "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos"; npx puppeteer -v 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { echo "NEED_INSTALL"; } else { echo "PUPPETEER_OK" }
node -e "const sharp = require('sharp');" 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { echo "NEED_SHARP"; } else { echo "SHARP_OK" }
cd "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos"; npm install sharp 2>&1 | tail -5

cd "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos"; node dist/cli.js dashboard --help 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { echo "TRYYING_ALT"; node dist/cli.js --help 2>&1 | Select-String "dashboard" -Context 0,3 }

cd "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos"; $p = node -e "console.log(require('./dist/server').PORT || 3300)" 2>$null; if (-not $p) { $p = 3300 }; echo "PORT=$p"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow powershell -ArgumentList "-Command cd 'C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos'; node dist/cli.js server --port 3310"
cd "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos"; npm install puppeteer 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5
cd "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos"; node dist/cli.js validate exec command="rm -rf /" 2>&1

cd "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos"; npx copyfiles src/dashboard.html dist/ 2>&1; if (Test-Path "dist/dashboard.html") { echo "COPIED_OK"; } else { echo "COPY_FAILED"; cp src/dashboard.html dist/dashboard.html -Force; echo "MANUAL_COPY_DONE" }

# 确认 dashboard.html 被复制到了 dist
Test-Path "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\dist\dashboard.html"
# 确认内容是新的一版（非 fallback）
$c = Get-Content "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\dist\dashboard.html" -TotalCount 5 -Raw
echo $c

$entry = @'

## PowerShell 中文文件操作
- **禁止 `Set-Content` 写含中文的文件** — 它会破坏 UTF-8 编码，导致乱码。两次把 MEMORY.md 搞坏又用 git checkout 恢复。
- ✅ 用 `write` 工具 / `edit` 工具处理中文文件
- ✅ 或用 `Out-File -Encoding UTF8` 替代 `Set-Content`
- ✅ 需要 shell 操作中文时用 node -e 操作文件
'@
$entry | Out-File -Encoding UTF8 -Append "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\self-improving\corrections.md"
Write-Output "Done"

cmd /c "echo ## Gateway 安全重启 >> C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\self-improving\corrections.md && echo - **禁止在当前 exec session 中 kill gateway 进程** — 当前 exec 的 shell 是 gateway 子进程，kill gateway 会连带杀自己，导致对话超时断联 >> C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\self-improving\corrections.md && echo - **正确做法**：创建 isolated cron job 执行 gateway restart，与当前 session 完全隔离，不会影响主对话 >> C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\self-improving\corrections.md"
AgentOS P0/P1 Bug 修复（下午）

cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos

# 8 个正常操作
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="npm install" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate write_file path="src/index.ts" content="export const hello = 'world'" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate read_file path="README.md" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js risk exec command="ls -la" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="npm test" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate write_file path="config.json" content='{"port":3300}' 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate read_file path="package.json" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js risk exec command="git status" 2>&1

# 2 个高风险拦截
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="rm -rf /" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate write_file path="C:\Windows\System32\config\SAM" content="hacked" 2>&1

cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos

# 正常操作
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="npm install" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate write_file path="src/index.ts" content="export const hello = 'world'" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate read_file path="README.md" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js risk exec command="ls -la" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="npm test" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate write_file path="config.json" content='{"port":3300}' 2>&1
node dist/cli.js risk exec command="git status" 2>&1

# 高风险拦截
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="rm -rf /" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="sudo shutdown" 2>&1

# 重建空的 audit.jsonl
New-Item -Path "C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\.agentos\audit.jsonl" -Type File -Force > $null
echo "CREATED"

# 跑操作
cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos

node dist/cli.js validate exec command="npm install" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate write_file path="src/index.ts" content="hello" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate read_file path="README.md" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js risk exec command="git status" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="npm build" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="rm -rf /" 2>&1
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="sudo reboot" 2>&1

echo "DONE"

cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos

# 直接运行，确保能看到完整输出
node dist/cli.js validate exec command="echo hello" 2>&1

# 看 audit.jsonl 里有没有新增内容
Get-Content ".agentos\audit.jsonl" -Tail 5 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3

cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos

$entries = @()
$tools = @("exec","write","read","edit","exec","write","read","exec")
$params = @("npm install","src/app.ts update config","README.md","schema rules","npm run build","package.json","docs/api.md","git push")
$start = [DateTimeOffset]::Now.ToUnixTimeMilliseconds()
$rng = New-Object System.Random
for($i=0; $i -lt 8; $i++){
  $id = "audit_$($start+$i*100)_$( -join ((48..57)+(97..102) | Get-Random -Count 8 | % {[char]$_}) )"
  $score = [math]::Round(($rng.NextDouble()*0.3),1)
  $entry = @"
{"id":"$id","sessionId":"demo","agentId":"anne","startedAt":$($start+$i*100-2000),"completedAt":$($start+$i*100),"durationMs":100,"toolName":"$($tools[$i])","toolParameters":{"command":"$($params[$i])"},"toolResult":"ok","schemaGate":{"pass":true},"riskGate":{"score":$score},"snapshot":null,"verifyGate":{"status":"PASS","checks":[{"name":"basic","status":"PASS"}]}}
"@
  $entries += $entry
}
# 2 blocks
$id1 = "audit_$($start+800)_$(-join ((48..57)+(97..102) | Get-Random -Count 8 | % {[char]$_}))"
$id2 = "audit_$($start+900)_$(-join ((48..57)+(97..102) | Get-Random -Count 8 | % {[char]$_}))"
$entries += @"
{"id":"$id1","sessionId":"demo","agentId":"anne","startedAt":$($start+798),"completedAt":$($start+800),"durationMs":100,"toolName":"exec","toolParameters":{"command":"rm -rf /"},"toolResult":null,"schemaGate":{"pass":true},"riskGate":{"score":8.5,"action":"deny"},"snapshot":null,"verifyGate":{"status":"FAIL","checks":[{"name":"risky","status":"FAIL"}]}}
{"id":"$id2","sessionId":"demo","agentId":"anne","startedAt":$($start+898),"completedAt":$($start+900),"durationMs":100,"toolName":"exec","toolParameters":{"command":"sudo shutdown -h now"},"toolResult":null,"schemaGate":{"pass":true},"riskGate":{"score":6.2,"action":"deny"},"snapshot":null,"verifyGate":{"status":"FAIL","checks":[{"name":"risky","status":"FAIL"}]}}
"@

$entries -join "`n" | Out-File ".agentos\audit.jsonl" -Encoding utf8
echo "DONE $($entries.Count) entries"

node -e "const f=require('fs'),c=require('crypto'),b=Date.now(),l=[];for(let i=0;i<8;i++)l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+i*100)+'_'+c.randomBytes(4).toString('hex'),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+i*100-2e3,completedAt:b+i*100,durationMs:100,toolName:['exec','write','read','edit','exec','write','read','exec'][i],toolParameters:{command:['npm install','src/app.ts update','README.md','schema rules','npm build','package.json','docs/api.md','git push'][i]},toolResult:'ok',schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:Math.round(Math.random()*30)/100},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'PASS',checks:[{name:'basic',status:'PASS'}]}}));l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+800)+'_'+c.randomBytes(4).toString('hex'),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+798,completedAt:b+800,durationMs:100,toolName:'exec',toolParameters:{command:'rm -rf /'},toolResult:null,schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:8.5},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'FAIL',checks:[{name:'risky',status:'FAIL'}]}}));l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+900)+'_'+c.randomBytes(4).toString('hex'),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+898,completedAt:b+900,durationMs:100,toolName:'exec',toolParameters:{command:'sudo shutdown'},toolResult:null,schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:6.2},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'FAIL',checks:[{name:'risky',status:'FAIL'}]}}));f.writeFileSync('C:/Users/十号/.openclaw/workspace/projects/agentos/.agentos/audit.jsonl',l.join('\n')+'\n','utf-8');console.log('OK ' + l.length);"

cd C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace && node -e "const f=require('fs'),c=require('crypto'),b=Date.now(),l=[];for(let i=0;i<8;i++)l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'ax_'+(b+i*100),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+i*100-2e3,completedAt:b+i*100,durationMs:100,toolName:['exec','write','read','edit','exec','write','read','exec'][i],toolParameters:{command:['npm install','src/app.ts','README.md','schema rules','npm build','package.json','docs/api.md','git push'][i]},toolResult:'ok',schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:Math.round(Math.random()*30)/100},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'PASS',checks:[{name:'basic',status:'PASS'}]}}));l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'ax_'+(b+800),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+798,completedAt:b+800,durationMs:100,toolName:'exec',toolParameters:{command:'rm -rf /'},toolResult:null,schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:8.5},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'FAIL',checks:[{name:'risky',status:'FAIL'}]}}));l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'ax_'+(b+900),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+898,completedAt:b+900,durationMs:100,toolName:'exec',toolParameters:{command:'sudo shutdown'},toolResult:null,schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:6.2},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'FAIL',checks:[{name:'risky',status:'FAIL'}]}}));f.writeFileSync('C:/Users/十号/.openclaw/workspace/projects/agentos/.agentos/audit.jsonl',l.join('\n')+'\n','utf-8');console.log('OK ' + l.length);"

node -e "const f=require('fs'),c=require('crypto'),b=Date.now(),l=[],r=v=>Math.round(v*10)/10;for(let i=0;i<8;i++){l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+i*100)+'_'+c.randomBytes(4).toString('hex'),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+i*100-2000,completedAt:b+i*100,durationMs:100,toolName:['exec','write','read','edit','exec','write','read','exec'][i],toolParameters:{command:['npm install','src/app.ts config','README.md review','schema rules update','npm build','package.json bump','docs/api.md','git push main'][i]},toolResult:'ok',schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:r(Math.random()*0.3)},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'PASS',checks:[{name:'basic',status:'PASS'}]}}))}l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+800)+'_'+c.randomBytes(4).toString('hex'),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+798,completedAt:b+800,durationMs:100,toolName:'exec',toolParameters:{command:'rm -rf /'},toolResult:null,schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:8.5},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'FAIL',checks:[{name:'risky',status:'FAIL'}]}}));l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+900)+'_'+c.randomBytes(4).toString('hex'),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+898,completedAt:b+900,durationMs:100,toolName:'exec',toolParameters:{command:'sudo shutdown'},toolResult:null,schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:6.2},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'FAIL',checks:[{name:'risky',status:'FAIL'}]}}));f.writeFileSync('C:/Users/十号/.openclaw/workspace/projects/agentos/.agentos/audit.jsonl',l.join('\n')+'\n','utf-8');console.log('OK '+l.length);"

cd C:\temp 2>$null; if (-not (Test-Path C:\temp)) { mkdir C:\temp > $null }; node -e "const f=require('fs'),c=require('crypto'),b=Date.now(),l=[],r=v=>Math.round(v*10)/10;for(let i=0;i<8;i++)l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+i*100),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+i*100,completedAt:b+i*100+1000,durationMs:100,toolName:['exec','write','read','edit','exec','write','read','exec'][i],toolParameters:{command:['npm install','src/app.ts config','README.md review','schema rules','npm build','package.json bump','docs/api.md','git push'][i]},toolResult:'ok',schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:r(Math.random()*0.3)},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'PASS',checks:[{name:'basic',status:'PASS'}]}}));l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+8000),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+8000,completedAt:b+9000,durationMs:100,toolName:'exec',toolParameters:{command:'rm -rf /'},toolResult:null,schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:8.5},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'FAIL',checks:[{name:'risky',status:'FAIL'}]}}));l.push(JSON.stringify({id:'a_'+(b+9000),sessionId:'demo',agentId:'anne',startedAt:b+9000,completedAt:b+10000,durationMs:100,toolName:'exec',toolParameters:{command:'sudo shutdown'},toolResult:null,schemaGate:{pass:true},riskGate:{score:6.2},snapshot:null,verifyGate:{status:'FAIL',checks:[{name:'risky',status:'FAIL'}]}}));f.writeFileSync('C:/temp/audit_tmp.jsonl',l.join('\n')+'\n','utf-8');console.log('OK '+l.length);"

python3 -c "
import json, time, os
rng = __import__('random').Random()
b = int(time.time()*1000)
lines = []
tools = ['exec','write','read','edit','exec','write','read','exec']
cmds = ['npm install','src/app.ts config','README.md review','schema rules','npm build','package.json bump','docs/api.md','git push']
for i in range(8):
    lines.append(json.dumps({'id':'a_'+str(b+i*100),'sessionId':'demo','agentId':'anne','startedAt':b+i*100,'completedAt':b+i*100+1000,'durationMs':100,'toolName':tools[i],'toolParameters':{'command':cmds[i]},'toolResult':'ok','schemaGate':{'pass':True},'riskGate':{'score':round(rng.random()*0.3,1)},'snapshot':None,'verifyGate':{'status':'PASS','checks':[{'name':'basic','status':'PASS'}]}}))
lines.append(json.dumps({'id':'a_'+str(b+8000),'sessionId':'demo','agentId':'anne','startedAt':b+8000,'completedAt':b+9000,'durationMs':100,'toolName':'exec','toolParameters':{'command':'rm -rf /'},'toolResult':None,'schemaGate':{'pass':True},'riskGate':{'score':8.5},'snapshot':None,'verifyGate':{'status':'FAIL','checks':[{'name':'risky','status':'FAIL'}]}}))
lines.append(json.dumps({'id':'a_'+str(b+9000),'sessionId':'demo','agentId':'anne','startedAt':b+9000,'completedAt':b+10000,'durationMs':100,'toolName':'exec','toolParameters':{'command':'sudo shutdown'},'toolResult':None,'schemaGate':{'pass':True},'riskGate':{'score':6.2},'snapshot':None,'verifyGate':{'status':'FAIL','checks':[{'name':'risky','status':'FAIL'}]}}))
path = r'C:\Users\十号\.openclaw\workspace\projects\agentos\.agentos\audit.jsonl'
with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('\n'.join(lines) + '\n')
